name: SunblastFLX
comment: The Sunblast FLX is an high power IP65 graphical strobe with advanced pixel mappable features that combines more effects into one unit. The unit is designed around a center white strings of LEDs to mimic the traditional look from Xenon-bulb strobes, and a cluster of high power RGB+WW LED panels that deliver powerful washlight, delivering high quality of white and beautiful saturated color.
